items.title: Amazon MGM Studios and Prime Video earn 68 Emmy Award nominations for "Spider-Noir," 'Fallout,' and more
items.summary: 'The Boys,' 'Bait,' and 'John Candy: I Like Me' were also among the nominees for the 2026 Emmy Awards.

items.title: A first look at ‘Campus Drivers,’ Prime Video’s adaptation of the best-selling novels coming November 2026
items.summary: The French Prime Video young adult series adapts author C.S. Quill's popular college romance novels.

items.title: Amazon's water conservation and replenishment efforts around the world
items.summary: Get the latest updates on how we’re reducing our water footprint and investing in innovations to address water scarcity.
